models.title: Models
models.directoryPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default location
models.directorySaved: Saved — restart the app to use the new directory.

datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.directoryPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default location
datasets.directoryHint: Holds downloaded archives before they're ingested. Separate from where ingested data lives. Changes apply on next launch.
datasets.directorySaved: Saved — restart the app to use the new directory.
datasets.keepRawDownloadsHint: After a dataset finishes ingesting, the downloaded archives can be deleted to reclaim space — the ingested data remains usable on its own.

chat.title: Chat
chat.llmHint: Restart the app for the change to apply.

gpu.title: GPU acceleration
gpu.statusUnsupported: GPU acceleration isn't supported on this platform.
gpu.statusNoDriver: No NVIDIA driver detected — GPU acceleration isn't available on this machine.
gpu.statusNotInstalled: NVIDIA driver detected. CUDA runtime is not installed.
gpu.statusIncompatibleArch: Detected GPU: {gpu} (compute capability {cc}). This build requires compute capability 7.0 or newer (Volta architecture and up). Older NVIDIA GPUs aren't reliably covered by cuDNN 9's kernel set for the operations this app uses.
gpu.statusIncompatibleArchCta: Download the Standard installer for GPU acceleration on this hardware (DirectML on Windows, Vulkan on Linux).
gpu.statusUpdateAvailable: CUDA runtime installed (version {installed}). A newer version is available: {available}.
gpu.manifestUnavailable: Couldn't reach the CUDA runtime manifest. Check your internet connection and try again.
gpu.completed: Installation complete. Restart the backend to enable GPU acceleration.
gpu.diskUsageHint: Uses about {size} of disk in your app-data folder.
gpu.removeConfirmBody: GPU acceleration will be disabled until you reinstall. About {size} of disk will be freed.

columnModes.title: Results display
columnModes.description: Default display mode for each cell kind in the results pane. The column header chip overrides these per-column.
columnModes.imageGalleryLayoutHint: When every column of a result is an image, render thumbnails as a wrapping gallery instead of a table.
